login.heading: Sign In
login.subheading: Welcome! Sign in to your Biohna account.
login.no_account: Not a member yet? Create an account →
login.brand_tagline: The soul of Morocco, shaped by its women, delivered intact to you

signin.heading: Create your account
signin.description: Access 100% natural, handmade products from Morocco.
signin.client_desc: I want to discover and buy
signin.vendor_desc: I want to list my products
signin.terms: I accept Biohna's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
signin.vendor_step_desc: Tell us more about your cooperative or brand so we can evaluate your application.
signin.products_desc_placeholder: Describe your products, expertise, and manufacturing methods...
signin.files_drag: Drag your files here or browse
signin.files_hint: PDF, JPG, PNG — 10 MB max per file
signin.success_message: Thank you for your application. We will review your documents and contact you shortly.
